scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (catalog, reflections, sources, users); Dremio's write endpoints (source/reflection create/update/delete, SQL job submission) are out of scope (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: SQL job submission is not a syncable object stream; legacy connector never implemented it
legacy connector never implemented source create/update; Pass B capability expansion
destructive source deletion; not modeled by legacy
